content: AI features in personal finance apps 2025: receipt OCR scanning (extract merchant, amount, date, items — 99.9% claimed accuracy but real-world depends on photo quality); auto-categorization via ML (95% success rate claimed); natural language insights ('you overspent on food 20% vs last month'); AI savings suggestions; predictive cash flow alerts. Receipt scanning is now table stakes in premium finance apps. One-way AI insights (not chat) reduce implementation risk and satisfy 80% of user insight needs.
